nodes.label: Dynamic Worker Model Pattern
nodes.rationale: Ephemeral workers spawned on demand, each handles one task, checks dependencies via Redis agent statuses, executes via tool registry, exits after completion. Prevents predefined agent brittleness and enables horizontal scaling.

nodes.label: Three-Layer Memory Architecture
nodes.rationale: Layer 1: Redis Hashes for active runtime context (6h TTL). Layer 2: PostgreSQL for compressed context and user preferences. Layer 3: Elasticsearch for semantic knowledge (places, hotels, cafes, transport). Prevents context explosion while maintaining semantic retrieval.

hyperedges.label: Trip Execution Pipeline: API → Planner → Workers → Results
